split_description.name: authorization_consent
split_description.description: Authorization and consent forms. Includes donor or next-of-kin signature, consent to donate, and authorization statements.

split_description.name: medical_records
split_description.description: Medical history records, physician notes, hospital records, labs, diagnoses, and cause of death documentation.

split_description.name: drai
split_description.description: Donor Risk Assessment Interview (DRAI). Contains behavioral risk questions and responses about HIV, hepatitis, and other infectious disease risks.

split_description.name: physical_assessment
split_description.description: Physical assessment or body evaluation form completed during recovery. Includes observations about skin, lesions, and physical condition.

split_description.name: idt_report
split_description.description: Infectious Disease Testing (IDT) report with serology results including HIV, HBV, HCV, HTLV, syphilis, CMV, and other required tests.

split_description.name: birth_delivery_summary
split_description.description: Birth and delivery summary for birth tissue donors. Contains gestational age, delivery date, APGAR scores, and prenatal care information.

split_description.name: recovery_timing_record
split_description.description: Recovery timing log recording time of death, cross-clamp time, refrigeration time, and recovery start/end times.

split_description.name: transfusion_record
split_description.description: Blood transfusion records documenting any transfusions received within 48 hours before death.

split_description.name: culture_results
split_description.description: Microbiological culture results from tissue samples including aerobic, anaerobic, and fungal cultures.

split_rules: Split the document into the applicable sections. Sections may only overlap at their first and last page if at all.
